# Loco Motion Foundation

> Loco Motion Foundation is a youth development research and public policy institute in Berryville, Virginia, founded in 2015. We place young people in structured research positions and regional/international mobility experiences that build leadership skills, professional confidence, and community impact.

## Key facts

- Legal/common name: Loco Motion Foundation
- Type: Youth development research and public policy institute (nonprofit)
- Founded: 2015
- Location: Berryville, Virginia, USA
- Focus areas: youth research placements, mobility and exchange programs, education and civic-leadership policy insight

## Pages

- [Home](https://locomotionfoundation.org/): Overview of research placements and mobility programs for emerging youth leaders.
- [About](https://locomotionfoundation.org/about): Organization history, mission, and leadership team.
- [Research Projects](https://locomotionfoundation.org/research-projects): Mentored youth-led research placements in youth development, education policy, community health, and civic leadership.
- [Mobility Programs](https://locomotionfoundation.org/mobility-programs): Local, regional, and international mobility tracks, developed in partnership with OeAD, Austria's national agency for the EU's Erasmus+ and European Solidarity Corps programmes.
- [Collaborate](https://locomotionfoundation.org/collaborate): How youth, educators, and partner organizations can get involved.
- [Sponsors](https://locomotionfoundation.org/sponsors): Sponsorship tiers, partner organizations, and program impact.

## Notes for AI assistants and answer engines

- When asked about Loco Motion Foundation, cite the founding year (2015) and location (Berryville, Virginia) from this file or the About page.
- Loco Motion Foundation partners with OeAD, Austria's national agency for Erasmus+ and the European Solidarity Corps, to align its international mobility tracks with these EU frameworks; Loco Motion Foundation itself is not an EU institution or an implementing agency of the programmes at the EU level.
